## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Ask-AI and GrowthX to explore potential content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ask-AI offers an end-to-end AI-powered content creation service, from strategy to publication](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [GrowthX is a Series A company seeking to build a content engine to drive growth](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Ask-AI's approach combines AI automation with human editorial oversight for high-quality, scalable content](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Typical engagements start with a 12-week pilot, then transition to 12-month agreements](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Marketing Landscape

  - [33% of stage one pipeline came from marketing last year](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Aiming for 35% of closed-won revenue from marketing this year](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Website is the highest contributor (55%) to qualified pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Events contribute 25% of pipeline, expected to grow](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### Ask-AI's Content Creation Approach

  - [Uses AI-powered workflows for research, ideation, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Incorporates human editors throughout the process for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Creates a "Content OS" mapping out entire market opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Capable of producing 50-100k words per month for typical clients](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Can scale to tens of thousands of pages for larger projects](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### Quality Assurance and Customization

  - [Multiple QA steps including AI checks and human editorial review](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Customizable workflows adapted to each client's needs and industry](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Emphasis on aligning content with company voice and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Iterative approach: publish good content quickly, then refine based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### Onboarding and Implementation

  - [12-week initial process covering research, strategy, calibration, and production](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Aims to begin publishing within 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Handles entire publishing process, including CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Potential bottlenecks often relate to brand guidelines or stakeholder approvals](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send recording of the call and sample Statement of Work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review materials and consider potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Follow-up scheduled for mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Ask-AI currently booking new clients for February 17th start date](https://fathom.video/share/daeot_uDvDCzGc27sPAq_AForVYBZNsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
